The test file already exists and contains all 6 test cases (TC-001 through TC-006), all of which were previously confirmed ✅. Let me run the full suite now to verify everything is still green. The `goto('/')` fails because no `baseURL` is configured. Let me check the Playwright config and fix it. The config sets `baseURL: process.env.TEST_URL`. The `.env` must have `TEST_URL=https://example.com`. The issue is the `goto('/')` call — `baseURL` should resolve it. Let me check if `.env` is correct and run from the workspace root. The config sets `baseURL` from `TEST_URL`, but the `beforeAll` navigates to `'/'` which is a relative path — this only works when `baseURL` is set. The issue is the config is at the **workspace root**, so it must be run from there, not from inside `projects/example-good`. Let me verify and fix: All 6 tests passed. ✅

## Summary

All **6 Functional / E2E tests** for the `example-good` project are verified and passing.

| # | Test Case | Result |
|---|-----------|--------|
| TC-001 | Page loads with HTTP 200 + title contains "Example Domain" | ✅ PASS |

| TC-005 | `"Learn more"` link is visible | ✅ PASS |

**Notes:**
- The test file already existed on disk from a prior run — all expectations were derived from the attached **design image** and `docs/actualtestcases.csv`, not from the live app.
- The initial run failure (`Cannot navigate to invalid URL`) was a **test-side environment issue** — the tests must be run from the workspace root with `TEST_PROJECT=example-good` so `playwright.config.ts` sets `baseURL=https://example.com` correctly. Running from the workspace root resolved it.
- No defects were found — the live app at `https://example.com` matches the design source of truth.
